briefdescription.para: Returns grid visibility for document.

simplesect.para: If grid is visible, return True.

briefdescription.para: Set grid visibility for document.

parameterdescription.para: Set to True to get grid visible.

briefdescription.para: Returns snap to grid status for document.

simplesect.para: If snap to grid is active on document, return True.

briefdescription.para: Activate or deactivate snap to grid for document.

parameterdescription.para: Set to True to activate snap to grid.

briefdescription.para: Returns grid offset (in pixels, from origin) for document.

simplesect.para: A QPoint that define X and Y offset.

briefdescription.para: Define grid offset (in pixels, from origin) for document.

parameterdescription.para: A QPoint that define X and Y offset (X and Y in range [0 - 500])

briefdescription.para: Returns grid spacing (in pixels) for document. Spacing value is used for grid type "rectangular".

simplesect.para: A QPoint that define X and Y spacing.

briefdescription.para: Set grid spacing (in pixels) for document. Spacing value is used for grid type "rectangular".

parameterdescription.para: A QPoint that define X and Y spacing (minimum value for X and Y is 1)

briefdescription.para: Returns if horizontal grid spacing is active. Spacing value is used for grid type "rectangular".

simplesect.para: a boolean which indicate if horizontal grid is active or not

briefdescription.para: Set horizontal grid spacing active. Spacing value is used for grid type "rectangular".

parameterdescription.para: True to activate horizontal spacing, False to deactivate it.

briefdescription.para: Returns if vertical grid spacing is active. Spacing value is used for grid type "rectangular".

simplesect.para: a boolean which indicate if vertical grid is active or not

briefdescription.para: Set vertical grid spacing active. Spacing value is used for grid type "rectangular".

parameterdescription.para: True to activate vertical spacing, False to deactivate it.

briefdescription.para: Returns number of grid subdivision for document. Subdivision value is used for grid type "rectangular".

simplesect.para: A positive integer value, starting from 1

briefdescription.para: Set number of grid subdivision for document. Subdivision value is used for grid type "rectangular".

parameterdescription.para: A positive integer value, in range [1 - 10]

briefdescription.para: Returns left angle (in degrees) of isometric grid for document. AngleLeft value is used for grid type "isometric".

simplesect.para: A positive decimal value, in range [0.00 - 89.00]

briefdescription.para: Set left angle (in degrees) of isometric grid for document. AngleLeft value is used for grid type "isometric".

parameterdescription.para: A positive decimal value, in range [0.00 - 89.00]

briefdescription.para: Returns right angle (in degrees) of isometric grid for document. AngleRight value is used for grid type "isometric".

simplesect.para: A positive decimal value, in range [0.00 - 89.00]

briefdescription.para: Set right angle (in degrees) of isometric grid for document. AngleRight value is used for grid type "isometric".

parameterdescription.para: A positive decimal value, in range [0.00 - 89.00]

briefdescription.para: Returns if left angle grid is active. Spacing value is used for grid type "isometric".

simplesect.para: a boolean which indicate if left angle grid is active or not

briefdescription.para: Set left angle grid active. Spacing value is used for grid type "isometric".

parameterdescription.para: True to activate left angle grid, False to deactivate it.

briefdescription.para: Returns if right angle grid is active. Spacing value is used for grid type "isometric".

simplesect.para: a boolean which indicate if right angle grid is active or not

briefdescription.para: Set right angle grid active. Spacing value is used for grid type "isometric".

parameterdescription.para: True to activate right angle grid, False to deactivate it.

briefdescription.para: Returns grid cell spacing (in pixels) for document. Cell spacing value is used for grid type "isometric_legacy".

simplesect.para: A positive integer value, minimum value is 10

briefdescription.para: Set grid cell spacing for document. Cell spacing value is used for grid type "isometric_legacy".

parameterdescription.para: A integer that define spacing, in range [10 - 1000]

briefdescription.para: Returns grid cell border size (in pixels) for document. Cell spacing value is used for grid type "isometric".

simplesect.para: A positive integer value, in range [10 - 1000]

briefdescription.para: Set grid cell size (in pixels) for document. Cell spacing value is used for grid type "isometric".

parameterdescription.para: An integer that define cell border size.

briefdescription.para: Returns current grid type applied for document.

simplesect.para:
The grid type can be:
"rectangular"
"isometric"
"isometric_legacy"

briefdescription.para: Set current grid type applied for document.

parameterdescription.para:
The grid type can be:
"rectangular"
"isometric"
"isometric_legacy"

briefdescription.para: Returns status of "Aspect locked" property for offset values (X and Y values are linked to keep ratio)

simplesect.para: If locked, return True.

briefdescription.para: Set status of "Aspect locked" property for offset values (X and Y values are linked to keep ratio)

parameterdescription.para: Set to True lock aspect.

briefdescription.para: Returns status of "Aspect locked" property for spacing values (mean, X and Y values are linked to keep ratio) SpacingAspectLocked value is used for grid type "rectangular".

simplesect.para: If locked, return True.

briefdescription.para: Set status of "Aspect locked" property for spacing values (X and Y values are linked to keep ratio) SpacingAspectLocked value is used for grid type "rectangular".

parameterdescription.para: Set to True lock aspect.

briefdescription.para: Returns status of "Aspect locked" property for angles values (mean, left and right angles values are linked to keep ratio) AngleAspectLocked value is used for grid type "isometric" and "isometric_legacy".

simplesect.para: If locked, return True.

briefdescription.para: Set status of "Aspect locked" property for angles values (left and right angles values are linked to keep ratio) AngleAspectLocked value is used for grid type "isometric" and "isometric_legacy".

parameterdescription.para: Set to True lock aspect.

briefdescription.para: Returns grid main line type.

simplesect.para:
The main line type for grid in current document Can be:
"solid"
"dashed"
"dotted"

briefdescription.para: Set grid main line type.

parameterdescription.para:
The main line type to apply for grid Can be:
"solid"
"dashed"
"dotted"

briefdescription.para: Returns grid subdivision line type.

detaileddescription.para:
The subdivision line type for grid in current document Can be:
"solid"
"dashed"
"dotted"
LineTypeSubdivision value is used for grid type "rectangular".

briefdescription.para: Set grid subdivision line type.

detaileddescription.para:
lineType
The subdivision line type to apply for grid Can be:
"solid"
"dashed"
"dotted"
LineTypeSubdivision value is used for grid type "rectangular".

briefdescription.para: Returns grid vertical line type.

detaileddescription.para:
The vertical line type for grid in current document Can be:
"solid"
"dashed"
"dotted"
"none"
LineTypeVertical value is used for grid type "isometric".

briefdescription.para: Set grid vertical line type.

detaileddescription.para:
lineType
The vertical line type to apply for grid Can be:
"solid"
"dashed"
"dotted"
"none"
LineTypeVertical value is used for grid type "isometric".

briefdescription.para: Returns grid main line color.

simplesect.para: The color for grid main line

briefdescription.para: Set grid main line color.

parameterdescription.para: The color to apply for grid main line

briefdescription.para: Returns grid subdivision line color ColorSubdivision value is used for grid type "rectangular".

simplesect.para: The color for grid subdivision line

briefdescription.para: Set grid subdivision line color ColorSubdivision value is used for grid type "rectangular".

parameterdescription.para: The color to apply for grid subdivision line

briefdescription.para: Returns grid vertical line color ColorSubdivision value is used for grid type "isometric".

simplesect.para: The color for grid vertical line

briefdescription.para: Set grid vertical line color ColorSubdivision value is used for grid type "isometric".

parameterdescription.para: The color to apply for grid vertical line

briefdescription.para: Load grid definition from an XML document.

parameterdescription.para: xml content provided as a string

simplesect.para: True if xml content is valid and grid has been loaded, otherwise False

briefdescription.para: Save grid definition as an XML document.

simplesect.para: A string with xml content

detaileddescription.para: The GridConfig class encapsulates a Krita Guides configuration.
